title: Pvp.Optimized
description: PvpOptimized is a performance-focused modpack designed specifically for competitive Minecraft PvP.
body:
# ⚔️ __***PvpOptimized***__

__***PvpOptimized***__ is a __*performance-focused PvP modpack*__ designed to __*maximize FPS*__ and __*improve combat clarity.*__ This pack is built for players who want __*smooth, responsive, and competitive gameplay*__ without unnecessary extras.

Whether you're __*dueling, grinding ranked, or playing on PvP servers,*__ __***PvpOptimized***__ gives you the __*competitive edge*__ you need.

---

## 🚀 __***Performance***__
- __*Massively improved FPS*__
- __*Reduced lag spikes and stuttering*__
- __*Optimized rendering and entity performance*__
- __*Smooth and stable gameplay, even on low-end PCs*__

---

## ⚔️ __***PvP Features***__
- __*Full support for PvP resource packs*__
- __*Cleaner visuals for better enemy visibility*__
- __*Reduced visual clutter*__
- __*Optimized particles for clearer fights*__
- __*Designed for competitive PvP environments*__

---

## 🎯 __***Benefits***__
- __*Lightweight and fast*__
- __*Built specifically for PvP*__
- __*No unnecessary or bloated mods*__
- __*Clean, competitive-ready experience*__
- __*Perfect for both low-end and high-end systems*__

---

## ☕ __***Support the Project***__

If you enjoy __***PvpOptimized***__ and want to support future updates, you can support me here:
  
[**Ko-fi**](https://ko-fi.com/teddz) 

[**Paypal**](https://www.paypal.com/qrcodes/p2pqrc/QNADNPS4AHPEA)

Your support helps improve performance, add new features, and keep the project updated. Thank you ❤️

---

__***Dominate fights. Boost FPS. Play at your best.***__
